lines.text: Unbilled receivables of $180000000 presented as contract assets (opening $150000000, closing $180000000) with billed receivables $420000000 per ASC 606 606-10-45-1, 606-10-50-9.
Professional services engagement classified as principal based on indicators (controls service delivery; bears delivery risk; pricing discretion) per ASC 606 606-10-55-36, 606-10-55-40.
Professional services revenue disaggregated by fee structure (hourly: $8500000000; fixed_fee: $12200000000; retainer: $1100000000) per ASC 606 606-10-50-5.
